taxonomy: Sykesia vaginans is a species of butterfly in the family Lycaenidae. It is a type of hairstreak butterfly endemic to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. The classification of Sykesia vaginans places it within the genus Sykesia, which is further categorized under the family Lycaenidae. Lycaenidae is a family of butterflies commonly known as gossamer-winged butterflies or blues. These butterflies are characterized by their small size, slender bodies, and distinctive wing patterns.
